actions.title: Cross-session sync config controls missing
actions.description: Cross-session sync had no user-facing config. Added runtime config object, IPC handlers, preload bridges, type decls, 5 state vars, Configs tab card with master toggle/TTL slider/broadcast toggle/conflict mode dropdown/sync toggle

actions.title: Thought-process toggle feature
actions.description: AI agents had no instruction to show reasoning. Added thoughtProcessEnabled toggle, Configs tab UI, injection in initializeTerminal that appends ## Thought Process instruction after system prompt

actions.title: AI agent tool calls dropped during streaming
actions.description: callLLM() SSE stream handler ignored delta.tool_calls, causing the AI to respond with truncated text and never complete tool-based actions like adding external activities. Fixed by adding tool call delta accumulation.
